features.featureTitle: Expose a `claimAdmin` call from the frontend Admin Dashboard page: if the authenticated user is not currently admin and no admin has been set yet (backend returns a designated 'unclaimed' status), display a prominent 'Claim Admin' button. On click, call the `claimAdmin` backend function and refresh the admin status check. If an admin is already set and the current user is not that admin, continue showing the existing 'Access Denied' message.
